name: Sloe Gin Fizz
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake the ingredients (lemon juice, powdered sugar, and sloe gin) with ice until chilled.
2. Strain into a highball glass filled with two ice cubes.
3. Fill the glass with club soda to within an inch of the top.
4. Stir gently.
5. Decorate with a slice of lemon.
